subject: hey
body:
let me have the name and number of your lead attorney in the event I need to get a message to you asap.  Also give me, or have your office give me, the address to mail you stuff etc.  and any other contact info I might need.    Who is the best contact person for you?  Visitation schedule., etc etc etc.
 


izmo@mindspring.com
EarthLink Revolves Around You.

subject: hey
body:
Let me know what your schedule is. (when are you going in?>)  Also make sure I have the name and number of whoever, in the event I have to get word to you about anything.

Mark

body:
